sage.name: Sage
lines: Before we build anything, we need to understand the business case.
What problem are we really trying to solve?

delta.name: Delta
lines: I hope you're ready to talk about data quality.
Because nobody else around here wants to.

nova.name: Nova
lines: Hey! I've been prototyping something cool.
Check this out - it's not production-ready but...
Actually, nothing I make is production-ready. That's my brand.
